title: Anti Enderman Grief
description: prevent endermen from picking up blocks!
body:
> If this project helped you, please consider leaving some stars [on the Github](https://github.com/Derec-Mods)!


This datapack introduces a simple yet effective system that prevents Endermen from placing or removing blocks in the world. Designed to maintain the integrity of your builds, this feature ensures that Endermen no longer cause unwanted changes to the environment. 

Be warned that the mod is simply a wrapper done through Modrinth, if you want the lightest version, just use the datapack. It can be ran on worlds running mods. 

## Modpack Usage

Just credit me and i'm chill with having this used in any modpacks



Join our modding discord!  (dm me about the SMP if interested)
![Discord](https://i.imgur.com/u3V5mdF.png)
[https://discord.gg/HM5XEe6pW6](https://discord.gg/HM5XEe6pW6)


The original derex smp, during the COVID years, also ran a version of this datapack from VanillaTweaks.

## ❤️ Credits:
_This was created for use on my forever world, called "derex smp". Check it out in action, server ip: `mc.longhorns.dev`_

Pack art credits - VanillaTweaks icon

Originally suggested by player D34DP1X3L, who was building a complex redstone music project inspired by Limbus Company.

brought to you by derex_, derexwq derec4, derexXD, dereXD, DereC_, CORRUPT_Greninja, lordnexus123, or whatever iteration of my username we are on at this point.
